option-a.comment: Right design language (pills, bars, flat) but missing C's structure

option-b.comment: Too much for v1 — checkboxes, batch, playing state, bottom sheet all premature

option-c.comment: Right structure (slide-over, detail strip, multi-sort, source pills) but want A's compact design language

overall: Merge A+C: C's layout (slide-over, detail strip, multi-column sort, source pills, accent-border selection) with A's design language (compact pill chips, thin vertical bars, flat styling). Multi-column sort is critical.
